overview: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy), originally founded as Regional Engineering College Tiruchirappalli in 1964, is India's premier autonomous public technical and research university. Declared an Institution of National Importance under the Ministry of Education, Government of India, it consistently ranks as the top technical school among all 31 NITs. The institute offers highly competitive undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral degrees in engineering, architecture, management, and sciences.
accreditation: An Institution of National Importance approved by the AICTE and Ministry of Education, Government of India.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: General/EWS/OBC (Family Income > ₹5 Lakhs): ₹62,500 per semester (Approximately ₹6.30 Lakhs to ₹6.63 Lakhs total fees for 4 years). 100% tuition exemption applies for SC/ST/PH categories and students with a verified family income below ₹1 Lakh per year.
General/EWS/OBC (Family Income > ₹5 Lakhs): ₹62,500 per semester (Approximately ₹7.88 Lakhs total course fees for 5 years). Category-wise exemptions match the central government guidelines.
General/OBC/EWS: Approximately ₹35,000 to ₹70,000 tuition fee per semester (Total institutional fees around ₹2.18 Lakhs for 2 years).
Approximately ₹35,000 to ₹37,500 tuition fee per semester (Total institutional fees around ₹2.18 Lakhs for 3 years).
Approximately ₹50,000 to ₹65,000 per semester (Total institutional fees around ₹2.64 Lakhs for 2 years).

placements.avgSalary: ₹17.50 LPA (Overall Institute Average), ₹23.64 LPA (B.Tech Computer Science Engineering Average)
placements.medianSalary: ₹14.35 LPA (UG 4-Year B.Tech), ₹6.00 LPA (UG 5-Year B.Arch), ₹9.75 LPA (PG 2-Year Programs)
placements.highestSalary: ₹59.30 LPA – ₹64.00 LPA (B.Tech Computer Science / ECE streams)
placements.placementRate: Approximately 85% to 88.9% overall placement rate across registered eligible branches
placements.totalOffers: 1,322 total placement offers generated by participating candidates
placements.companiesVisited: Over 100 to 370+ premier global corporations and recruiters actively participated
placements.internationalOffers: Highly active across global tech domains, specific numbers kept confidential under placement cell norms

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech and B.Arch allocations are managed through JoSAA/CSAB counseling rounds based on JEE Main scores. M.Tech relies on valid GATE allocations via CCMT. MCA allocations are determined strictly through NIMCET evaluations, and MBA admissions utilize CAT percentiles followed by GD/PI evaluations.
admissions.importantDates: Runs concurrently with centralized national schedules issued by the National Testing Agency (NTA), JoSAA/CSAB, and CCMT platforms.

campus.area: Sprawling 800-acre state-of-the-art residential green campus located on the Tiruchirappalli-Thanjavur Highway, Tamil Nadu
campus.specialNote: Hostel room rents, mess advanced dues, and establishment charges total roughly ₹40,000 to ₹45,000 per semester. Remission demands require valid, digitally signed Income Certificates for the active fiscal cycle from a competent local revenue officer.

availableScholarships: National Scholarship Portal (NSP) Central Sector Schemes
Prime Minister's Research Fellowship (PMRF) for Doctoral Scholars
scholarshipsAndAid.details: General, EWS, and OBC-NCL candidates with verified annual parental income under ₹1 Lakh receive 100% tuition remission. Students with parental income ranging between ₹1 Lakh and ₹5 Lakhs per year receive a 2/3rd waiver on base tuition components.

rankings.nirf: Ranked #9 under the Engineering Category and #30 under the Overall Category in India by NIRF 2025
rankings.naac: Not applicable (An autonomous Institute of National Importance governed via the central National Institutes of Technology Act)

contact.address: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli, Tanjore Main Road, National Highway 67, Near Thuvakudi, Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu 620015
